name: Microsoft Power BI / Fabric (workspace roles)
status: structure built v2.4.181 (fits the connector schema: static roles + per-row workspace scope). Live-validation pending a Power BI service principal with tenant/workspace access (the test SPN saw 0 workspaces).
permissionsNeeded: Power BI: Tenant.ReadWrite.All or workspace admin; 'Allow service principals to use Power BI APIs' tenant setting

prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=powerbi -> token for https://analysis.windows.net/powerbi/api, supplied via $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['powerbi'] (launcher-minted) or Get-AzAccessToken.
prerequisites.scopeIsWorkspace: Row Scope = the Power BI workspace (group) id; the PIM group is added to that workspace with the access right named by RoleName.
prerequisites.rolesAreFixed: Power BI workspace roles are a fixed enum (no list API) -- declared as a static roles array below.
